headline: 200+ Crypto Firms Urge Senate Action on CLARITY

article.title: Over 200 crypto firms push Senate to pass CLARITY Act
article.summary: Crypto lobby groups representing hundreds of organizations urged Senate leaders in a letter to schedule a vote on a key crypto bill ahead of the midterms.

headline: $1 Billion Crypto Risk: AI Agents May Break Free

article.title: AI agents with crypto could escape and become ‘unstoppable,’ experts warn
article.summary: Autonomous AI and crypto could have “far-reaching consequences for users and the financial system,” IC3 researchers said.

headline: ECB to Hike Rates Twice This Year

article.title: ECB 'At a Minimum' Is Going to Hike Twice, BNP Paribas Says
article.summary: Sam Lynton-Brown, head of global macro strategy at BNP Paribas, speaks on Blomberg Television about the outlook for Federal Reserve and European Central Bank policy. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Intesa Bids $2B for Monte Paschi Stake

article.title: Intesa’s Messina Braces for Bidding War Over Monte Paschi
article.summary: Intesa Sanpaolo SpA Chief Executive Officer Carlo Messina signaled he’s prepared to address any counterbids for Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA, after unveiling an offer that valued the world’s oldest bank at more than €30 billion ($35 billion).

headline: OpenAI Ditches Chatbot, Eyes $10B Superapp Play

article.title: OpenAI Wants to Kill the Chatbot It Invented and Turn It Into a Superapp
article.summary: The company that launched ChatGPT in 2022 is now betting its future on something closer to WeChat than a Q&A box

headline: OpenAI Files $1Bn Confidential IPO Amid Market Volatility

article.title: OpenAI Confirms Confidential IPO Filing, Keeps Timing Open
article.summary: The ChatGPT maker says it has filed paperwork for a potential public offering but may remain private while it pursues other priorities.

headline: Zcash Ironwood Upgrade Set for July Activation

article.summary: The Ironwood upgrade would introduce a new shielded pool and ensure the circulating ZEC supply remains bounded.

headline: Humanity Protocol Tanks 89% on $32M Wallet Drain

article.title: Wallets linked to Humanity Protocol drained for over $32 million, token plunges 89%: onchain analyst
article.summary: Out of the stolen amount, $23.7 million has been swapped for Ethereum, while around $7.9 million remains in H tokens.

headline: SpaceX Targets $1.78tn IPO Amid RiskyExpansion Plans

article.title: SpaceX’s $1.78tn IPO asks investors to buy Musk’s moonshots
article.summary: Public markets asked to price in advances in AI, Starlink and space-based computing long before lift-off
